# Gambatte provenance

- Upstream: https://github.com/libretro/gambatte-libretro
- Revision: `dfc165599f3f1068c40a0b7ad6fe5f161283d483`
- License: GPL-2.0-only, retained verbatim in `LICENSE.txt`
- Source input: `gambatte-src` in the repository flake
- Integration: pinned libretro core statically linked into the Rust host

Local patches are applied in the order listed by `patches/series`. The pinned
revision currently needs no source patches.
